case_title: MEDEL RAMON et al VS GOMEZ NELSON A.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,375.00 FILED BY MEDEL RAMON VILLALOBOS LUCIA AS TO DEFENDANT GOMEZ NELSON A. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-08-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MEDEL RAMON VILLALOBOS LUCIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOMEZ NELSON A. $2,375.00 PRINCIPAL, $8.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,383.00, PAYABLE AS FOLLOWS; $125 ON 11/1/92, & ON 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH. 3/1/92 THE FULL BAL WILL BE PAID. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
